gladius.advice_1: High maneuverability. It out-turns you. Force a joust.
gladius.advice_2: Its nose section is fragile. Destruction disables the ship.
gladius.advice_3: Do not dogfight. Use missiles to force it to break engagement.

vanguard.advice_1: Shield health is high. Sustained fire is required.
vanguard.advice_2: Large cross-section. Easy to hit from above or below.
vanguard.advice_3: Aim for the engine nacelles. Loss of one causes a spin.

arrow.advice_1: Extremely small profile. Use lag pips.
arrow.advice_2: It relies on speed. One solid ballistics hit will cripple it.
arrow.advice_3: Vulnerable to distortion damage. Overload its power plant.

cutlass.advice_1: Large emissions make it susceptible to missile fire.
cutlass.advice_2: Most weaponry face forward. Postion off the nose.
cutlass.advice_3: Has fire sustained fire; remain mobile to avoid incoming fire.

hammerhead.advice_1: Do not engage alone. Stay out of the 2.5 kilometer turret range.
hammerhead.advice_2: An often unmanned top turret leaves it vulnerable to close-range missiles.
hammerhead.advice_3: Disable engines if able. Focus fire manned turrets with ballistics.
